channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Reall Polls for Protagon, 18–20 April 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
11 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Reall Polls for Protagon, 18–20 April 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/greek_ep_polls/2026-04-20-ReallPolls.html
